title: Select fields to display in map view card (in addition to Lead Name field)
excerpt:
Who else would like to be able to view your CRM leads on map view - and select what fields show on the ‘card’ that pops up when clicking on a lead? 
Please vote for this if you would like it!

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Marty,

I’d like to introduce you our app Map View Pro. With our app you get a more customizable map view compared to the map view widget from monday.com.

You can configure which columns to show when you click the pin and even define which column to use as a color source for the pins on your map. For example, color the pins based on the items status.

Hope this helps and don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions!

Best,

Maarten
